title: SENSARTE Non Stick Crepe Pan, Dosa Pan Die-cast Auluminium Pancake Flat Skillet Tawa Griddle 26cm with Stay-Cool Handle, Induction Compatible, PFOA Free
features: Swiss Non-Stick Coating - Switzerland ILAG nonstick granite coating, SGS approved. PFOA free, smokeless, safe & healthy. Cooking with little oil for healthy diet.

Suitable For All Stoves - High magnetic conductive stainless steel base allows the pancake pan to work on all cooktops, including induction. The core of the crepe pan is die cast aluminum, which is durable and heats up quickly and evenly.

Perfect Cookware - Large 26cm diameter makes crepes to suit the biggest appetites; Lipping around the edge to make sure that liquid doesn't run off, 1/2 inch high side makes the crepe flipping much easier. Perfect for crepes, pancakes, hoe cakes, tortillas, onigiri, and more.

Lightweight & Safe - Weighs 870 g. This non-stick dosa pan is light enough to make flipping your crepes easy and move around the kitchen; Its Heat Resistant Bakelite Handle is suitable for grasping and staying cooling while cooking. Oven safe to 150℃.
Easy To Clean - Nonstick and no rivets, the tortilla maker is super easy to clean. Simply wipe it over with a sponge and warm soapy water. Make your daily food intake easier to make.
description: Product Description Makes Your Daily Cooking Enjoyable Sensarte Nonstick Crepe Pan is an EXCELLENT tool in making a variety of foods including rotis / chapatis / breads, grilling etc. Pancakes get a nice golden brown and tortillas get just the right amount of heat. Large 10-inch diameter makes crepes to suit the biggest appetites; Crepe pan interior & exterior is coated by high performance non-stick granite stone coating, which makes the crepe pan easy to cook and clean. The core of the pan is made of die-cast aluminum, heats up quickly and evenly and won't warp. Weighs less than 2lbs, light enough to make flipping your crepes easy. This is a very handy pan to have and is very easy to store in the kitchen due to its thin profile. No rivets and super easy to clean. Just wipe it with a paper towel or rinse it with water, which make cooking not only easier but also more enjoyable. A solid choice for lovers of cooking on the stovetop. Perfect for crepes, pancakes, hoe cakes, tortillas, onigiri, and more. Magnetic Conductive Bottom Flat and thick bottom (5mm) Stainless steel induction base Fast cooking and heat evenly Suitable for all stove, Including induction. Ergonomic Bakelite Handle The handle is made of bakelite, so it's comfortable to hold and stays cooling while cooking, reduces heat burn opportunities. 1/2 Inch Deep Side The sides of the dosa pan are about 1/2 inch deep. That means they're low enough to make it easy to ladle your batter where you want it. And the pan is flat so the batter spreads evenly using the crepe tool. USE & CARE Stay away from metal utensil in cooking as well as steel wools in cleaning. Use High Heat Plastic or Wood utensils. Clean with soap, water, soft sponge and wipe with thin film of Oil; After cooking on it, leave it on the stove to cool down on it's own; Designed for all stovetops, including induction stovetop. Low to medium heat is recommended. Oven safe to 302℉; Suitable for dishwasher at low temperature; Recommend hand washing for longer term use; The Instruction is on the back of the card; Nonstick Frying Pan Nonstick Frying Pan with Lid Nonstick Griddle Pan Nonstick Sauce Pan Nonstick Frying Pan Nonstick Frying Pan with Lid Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 16,901 4.5 out of 5 stars 16,901 4.5 out of 5 stars 264 4.3 out of 5 stars 30 4.2 out of 5 stars 78 — Price £18.04 £ 18 . 04 £29.99 £ 29 . 99 — no data — no data — no data — no data Nonstick Coating ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Induction Compatible ✓ ✓ Oven Safe ✓ ✓ ✓
